text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly at -0.7%, holding near round levels despite extreme fear conditions that have intensified over the past week. Bitcoin dominance at 55.8% and $43B in daily volume suggest the selloff is broad-based rather than a panic exodus, with traders maintaining position sizes through minor declines. Altcoins are underperforming slightly (BNB, SOL down 1.0–1.5%), a typical signal that risk appetite remains suppressed but not yet shattered.
